volumeHelp: Kiliki e maua ai le fa'ase'e tele
statusLoadingNoDesc: O lo'o utaina le fa'amatalaga e le o fa'amatalaina
statusLoadingNext: O lo'o utaina le isi ala
alertDescribedVersion: Fa'aaogā le fa'amatalaga fa'alogo leo o lenei vitio
alertNonDescribedVersion: Fa'aaogā le fa'amatalaga e le fa'amatalaina o lenei vitio
fallbackError1: Fa'amalie atu, e le mafai e lau su'esu'ega ona ta'alo lenei
fallbackError2: O su'esu'ega nei o lo'o iloa e galulue ma lenei mea fa'asalalau
prefIntroCaptions: O filifiliga nei e pulea ai le fa'aalia o fa'aupuga.
prefIntroDescription1: E lagolagoina e lenei mea fa'asalalau fa'amatalaga leo i ni auala se lua:
prefIntroDescription2: O le vitio o loʻo iai nei
prefIntroDescriptionNone: O le vitio o lo'o i ai nei e leai se fa'amatalaga fa'alogo i so'o se fa'atulagaga.
prefIntroDescription3: Fa'aoga le fomu o lo'o i lalo e fa'atulaga ai mea e te mana'o iai e feso'ota'i ma fa'amatalaga leo fa'avae i tusitusiga.
prefIntroDescription4: A mae'a ona e fa'asaoina au fa'atulagaga, e mafai ona fa'asolo le fa'amatalaga leo ile fa'aogaina ole fa'amatalaga.
prefIntroKeyboard1: E mafai ona fa'agaioia le fa'asalalauga fa'asalalau i luga o le itulau lenei i so'o se mea i luga o le itulau e fa'aaoga ai ala pupuu (silasila i lalo mo se lisi).
prefIntroKeyboard2: E mafai ona tu'uina atu i lalo ki sui (Shift, Alt, ma le Pule).
prefIntroKeyboard3: FAAMANATU: E ono fete'ena'i nisi tu'ufa'atasiga ma ki o lo'o fa'aogaina e lau su'esu'ega ma/po'o isi polokalama fa'akomepiuta.
prefIntroTranscript: O mana'oga o lo'o mulimuli mai e a'afia ai le tusitusiga feso'ota'i.
prefCookieWarning: O le teuina o ou mana'oga e mana'omia ai kuki.
prefHeadingKeyboard2: Ala pupuu keyboard o iai nei
escapeKeyFunction: Tapuni talanoaga o lo'o i ai nei po'o le lisi o fa'alauiloa
prefDescFormatHelp: Afai o lo'o avanoa ia fa'asologa e lua, e na'o le tasi e fa'aaogaina.
prefDescFormatOption1: isi fa'amatalaga fa'amatalaina o le vitio
prefDescFormatOption2: fa'amatalaga fa'atatau i tusitusiga, fa'asalalau e le faitau lautusi
prefDescPause: Otometi ona taofi le vitio pe a amata faʻamatalaga
sampleDescriptionText: Fetuuna'i tulaga e fa'alogo ai i lenei fa'ata'ita'iga tusitusiga.
prefTabbable: Tusitusi e mafai ai le keyboard
prefNoChange: E te le'i faia ni suiga.
windowMoveUp: Ua sii i luga le faamalama
windowMoveStopped: Na taofi le fe'avea'i o fa'amalama
windowMoveAlert: Toso pe fa'aoga ki aū e fa'aoso ai le fa'amalama;
windowSendBackAlert: O lenei fa'amalama o lo'o i tua atu o isi mea i luga o le itulau.
windowBringTopAlert: O lenei fa'amalama o lo'o i luma o isi mea i luga o le itulau.
resultsSummary4: Kiliki le taimi e fesoʻotaʻi ma soʻo se mea e taʻalo ai le vitio mai lena taimi.
aboutTitle: E uiga i le Able Player
webEditionDescription: Lomiga fa'apitoa ma fa'alautele o le Able Player avanoa fa'asalalau fa'asalalau.
wpEditionDescription: O le WordPress plugin lea e faʻaopoopoina ai le Elementor widget, ua mamanuina e tuʻufaʻatasia ai se faʻasalalauga faʻapitoa ma faʻalauteleina o le Able Player avanoa faʻasalalau faʻasalalau.
thirdPartyDescription: O lenei oloa e aofia ai le polokalama tatala-source lea:
distributedUnder: Fa'asoa i lalo o aiaiga o le
